headline: Has Quanta Services (PWR) Run Too Far After Infrastructure And Energy Transition Tailwinds?
summary: If you are wondering whether Quanta Services' share price still reflects fair value after a strong run, you are not alone. The stock closed at US$549.22, with a 7 day return of a 2.8% decline, a 30 day return of 12.4%, a year to date return of 24.9%, a 1 year return of 128.3% and a 3 year return of 243.5%. Over 5 years the return is very large. Recent news flow around Quanta Services has focused on its role in large scale infrastructure and energy transition projects, along with ongoing...
